## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content updates, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unusual traffic patterns observed, possibly due to migration or seasonal factors](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Vendor directory pages progressing, with all 26 articles from latest batch due by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [New project of 50 sales tax pages for each state to begin alongside vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Some UX improvements may be needed for business credit card pages to compete with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Blog: Clicks fell while impressions increased](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - ["Cash flow issues for small businesses" page traffic dropped significantly after January](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Best business credit card pages showing high volatility week-to-week](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Per diem pages: Significant drop in performance](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [No clear reason identified; possibly related to March core algorithm update or seasonality](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [Some pages captured snippets for local searches (e.g., Virginia, West Virginia)](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Expense category pages: Remained stable within expected range](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Massive fall in clicks and impressions, but no significant position changes](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Content Updates and Improvements

  - ["Calculating depreciation expense" page needs a calculator tool to match user intent](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Business credit card pages may benefit from UX improvements (e.g., horizontal table element)](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Treasury rate comparison table being implemented by Ali for certain pages](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [10 accounting pages to incorporate comparison cards; team to discuss implementation approach](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Vendor Directory Pages

  - [Latest batch of 26 articles to be completed by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Workflow changes: Moving completed pages to main assignments tab in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Keeping vendor pages tab for new topics and categories](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Treasury and Tuning Pages

  - [Editorial treasury pages delivered to Ali](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Tuning page edits addressed and queued for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Programmatic best banks pages to be generated by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### New Sales Tax Project

  - [50 new pages related to sales tax for each state](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [To run parallel with vendor directory project without causing delays](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Additional writer brought on board to handle increased workload](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete and deliver all 26 vendor directory articles by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Publish remaining tuning pages by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Victoria to review newly sent vendor pages from Nika](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Vivek to share more details on the sales tax project](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Discuss implementation of comparison cards for 10 accounting pages offline](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance, especially per diem pages, for another week](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Begin work on 50 sales tax pages alongside vendor directory project](https://fathom.video/share/_aiLAo1KaJ8Y-gE_qDFWFMy7RYpgtK_R?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
